name: Bagel Thins, Lo Cal, Lo Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a very sharp serrated knife, slice bagel into very thin rounds.
2. Arrange the slices in a single layer on a baking sheet.
3. Brush each slice with melted margarine.
4. Sprinkle oregano over the slices.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
6. Let cool and store in an airtight container for up to 1 week.
Per serving: 14 calories; 0.5 grams fat, 0 cholesterol, 15 milligrams salt.
